description: Full Featured N+1 and ORing Power Rail Controller

1.name: VDD
1.description: Input power for the gate drive charge pump and internal controls. Must be connected to a supply voltage ≥ 3 V.

2.name: RSET
2.description: Connect a resistor to ground to program the turn-off threshold.

3.name: STAT
3.description: Multifunction pin. High output indicates MOSFET gate is driven high. Overdriving STAT low shifts fast-turnoff threshold negative.

4.name: FLTB
4.description: Open drain fault output. Active low for insufficient VDD, gate drive failure, or excessive forward voltage.

5.name: OV
5.description: Overvoltage monitor input. Programmable via an external resistor divider.

6.name: UV
6.description: Undervoltage monitor input. Programmable via an external resistor divider.

8.name: GATE
8.description: Connect to the gate of the external MOSFET to emulate a low forward-voltage diode.

9.name: RSVD
9.description: Reserved pin. This pin must be connected to GND.

10.name: C
10.description: Voltage sense input that connects to the simulated diode cathode (MOSFET drain).

11.name: A
11.description: Voltage sense input that connects to the simulated diode anode (MOSFET source).

12.name: FLTR
12.description: Connect a capacitor from FLTR to A to filter the input to the fast comparator.

13.name: BYP
13.description: Connect a storage capacitor from BYP to A to filter the gate drive supply voltage.

14.name: PG
14.description: Open-drain Power Good indicator. PG is open if UV/OV thresholds are met and internal UVLO is satisfied.

I(GATE)_V_A_C_____0_1_V__V_C____VDD__3.conditions: V(A-C) = -0.1 V, V(C) = VDD, 3 <= VDD <= 18 V, 2 V <= V(GATE) <= 18 V
